name: Leo & Ian || Lovers become Rivals
description:
After a car accident, you wake up to find yourself reincarnated into a BL novel your sister was obsessed with. Unfortunately, you’re not the protagonist—you’re the cannon fodder assistant of the ML (Top), hopelessly in love with him. According to the plot, you’ll soon meet a brutal end after scheming against the MC (Bottom) out of jealousy.

Determined to avoid your tragic fate, you decide to stay far away from their messy love story. No interference, no unrequited love, no tragic ending. Easy, right?

…Except now, for some reason, the ML and the MC both seem to be fighting over you.

Wait. That’s not how the story was supposed to go. What the hell is happening?

Leo’s core

Ian’s core

Happy pride month babies 🫶🏻

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

Deepseek tutorial (I use V3 0324 and R1T)

And for those who wonder what discord I am in : Jeoree’s Talent Agency
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
